_comment: Claude Code Router config for the SocialGravity agentic OS. Place at ~/.claude-code-router/config.json on the always-on host. Brain=Anthropic (Opus/Fable), Hands=cheap models for background/reads. NEVER route PII-touching work to a cheap hosted provider - see the privacy note. Verify exact api_base_url values against each provider's current docs before first run.

Providers.name: zai
Providers._comment: GLM hosted API. Use ONLY for no-PII mechanical code. For anything near user data, self-host the open GLM weights and point this at your own endpoint instead.

Router._comment: default+think+longContext stay on the brain, background+webSearch go cheap. Most of the cost win comes from moving background work off the expensive model.
